name: Aseptic Environmental Control
summary: Grade A airflow and environmental excursions in the fill suite remain the highest-risk theme and warrant tighter HEPA maintenance trending.

name: GMP Documentation Practices
summary: Record completion, verification evidence, and good-documentation-practice corrections are recurring audit and deviation themes.

name: Packaging & Line Clearance
summary: Secondary packaging and line-clearance checklist gaps point to checklist completeness improvements during changeover.

name: Product Quality Complaints
summary: Visible particulate complaints suggest visual-inspection reconciliation thresholds should be more explicit.
